title: polypodium vulgare
intro: Polypodium vulgare, also known as common polypody or polypody fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's leaves and rhizomes are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function. Additionally, polypodium vulgare is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and as an antiseptic agent to prevent infections.
